title: 12 feeds, 1,000 updates an hour. Your morning brief only re-writes when something actually happened.

beats.name: cold-boot
beats.caption: the desk wires up · 12 feeds, the cluster, the brief — lit once

beats.name: quiet
beats.caption: 1,000 updates an hour · every re-tick memo-skips · cost flat near zero

beats.name: self-tick
beats.caption: self-tick audit floor · the Briefing re-checks itself · no event, no cost

beats.name: hero-breaking-story
beats.caption: HERO: Reuters breaks a quake · one lane lights · the brief re-writes ONCE

beats.name: dedup-diamond
beats.caption: the SAME quake hits AP · the cluster dedupes it · the Briefing does NOT re-render

beats.name: second-event
beats.caption: a NEW story (a merger) on Bloomberg · the brief re-writes again · surprise, not volume

beats.name: red-fail
beats.caption: a corrupt AFP dispatch fails RED · no downstream · the prior brief stands

beats.name: recover-spike
beats.caption: AFP recovers GREEN · a third real story lands · the tallest brief spike fires

beats.name: final-quiet
beats.caption: the wires go quiet again · cost back to flat · the brief holds
